description: Determines the top-level threat or tension affecting a fantasy world. Part of the Fantasy World Crafter system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the top-level threat or tension affecting a fantasy world. Part of the Fantasy World Crafter system.

entries.result: War: The world is either currently embroiled in, or on the verge of, war

resultTranslations.en: War: The world is either currently embroiled in, or on the verge of, war

entries.result: Menace: A singular being is menacing this world. For instance, a dragon that terrorizes the land, or a demon lord who dispatches imps to harass people

resultTranslations.en: Menace: A singular being is menacing this world. For instance, a dragon that terrorizes the land, or a demon lord who dispatches imps to harass people

entries.result: The Dark Lord: A singular and powerful being bent on overthrowing and dominating this setting, often through war

resultTranslations.en: The Dark Lord: A singular and powerful being bent on overthrowing and dominating this setting, often through war

entries.result: The Hunt Is On: Something powerful and important must be found to save the land. For instance, a divine cup that will heal blighted fields, or a magical artifact that is precious to the dominant religion but has been stolen

resultTranslations.en: The Hunt Is On: Something powerful and important must be found to save the land. For instance, a divine cup that will heal blighted fields, or a magical artifact that is precious to the dominant religion but has been stolen

entries.result: Prophecy of Change: A prophecy that foretells great change or doom appears to be coming true

resultTranslations.en: Prophecy of Change: A prophecy that foretells great change or doom appears to be coming true

entries.result: Power Vacuum: The dominant leader is gone and without a replacement, leaving chaos and competition to see who will claim the mantle

resultTranslations.en: Power Vacuum: The dominant leader is gone and without a replacement, leaving chaos and competition to see who will claim the mantle

entries.description: Roll one additional Keyword from the Plot Twists Meaning table for a total of three Keywords to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll one additional Keyword from the Plot Twists Meaning table for a total of three Keywords to make your interpretation
